nasb.text: and the priest shall dip his finger in the blood and sprinkle some of the blood seven times before the Lord, in front of the veil of the sanctuary.

esv.text: and the priest shall dip his finger in the blood and sprinkle part of the blood seven times before the Lord in front of the veil of the sanctuary.

cnv.text: 祭司要把指頭蘸在血裡，在耶和華面前向著聖所的幔子，彈血七次。

ccb.text: 在耶和华面前用手指蘸血向圣所的幔子弹洒七次，
